{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Last Horizon's blueprints
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] made fabricators based on [[The Last Horizon's blueprints]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
